ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the book belongs to */,
  "sub_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-genre the book belongs to */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher of the book */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the book was published */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN number of the book */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the book */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary or synopsis of the book */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the book's cover image */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the book is written */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the book (e.g., hardcover, paperback, e-book) */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Number of copies available in stock */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the book */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_sub_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_genre_id") REFERENCES sub_genres ("sub_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the author (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Author's nationality */,
  "awards" TEXT /* List of awards the author has received */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the author's official website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the author's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon or image representing the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_genres" (
  "sub_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-genre */,
  "sub_genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-genre */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the sub-genre belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical sub-genres) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon or image representing the sub-genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the publisher's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the publisher's logo */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the publisher was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON object containing user preferences (e.g., favorite genres, reading history) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review is from a verified purchaser */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as helpful */,
  "unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as unhelpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the rating is from a verified purchaser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the recommendation was generated */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book recommended */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was generated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation (e.g., collaborative filtering, NLP, editorial) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who entered the search query */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the search query */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date the search query was entered */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of search query (e.g., title, author, genre) */,
  "results_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned by the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "browsing_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each browsing history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who browsed the book */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book browsed */,
  "browsing_date" TEXT /* Date the book was browsed */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration the user spent browsing the book */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, add to cart, purchase) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_browsing_history_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_browsing_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_authors" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "author_id")
)
